name: Pancake Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 c Instant Non Fat Dry Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and stir together to blend well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a large, airtight container.
3. Label the container as "PANCAKE MIX" and store it in a cool, dry place.
4. Use the PANCAKE MIX within 6 to 8 months. It makes about 13 cups of pancake mix.
